label.title: Roles Usage Report
label.description: Complete report of roles usage: role definitions, every ACE referencing them in the default and live workspaces, and cleanup of orphaned ACEs whose principal no longer exists.
label.loadError: Failed to load data. Check the server logs.
label.usageLegend: Usage columns show GRANT / DENY / external ACE counts per workspace.
label.noResults: No role matches the current filters.
label.orphansDescription: ACEs whose principal (user or group) no longer exists. They grant nothing and can safely be removed once you have verified that all external user providers (LDAP, SSO…) are connected.
label.orphansEmpty: No orphaned ACEs found — every ACE principal resolves to an existing user or group.
label.confirmMessage: This will permanently remove {{count}} ACEs whose principal no longer exists, in both workspaces. This action cannot be undone.
label.confirmLdapWarning: Warning: if an external user/group provider (LDAP, SSO…) is currently disconnected, its principals appear as missing and their ACEs would be removed. Make sure all providers are connected before proceeding.
label.removeError: Failed to remove orphaned ACEs. Check the server logs.
